meta.description: Validation rules and checks for verifying generated UI code against the MSM Portal Design System. Used in Phase 4 of the generation protocol.

architecture.name: Page is thin wrapper
architecture.check: Page file contains only: import + default export rendering Container. No useState, useEffect, useQuery, useNavigate, useTranslation, useEntityParam.

architecture.name: Container handles all data
architecture.check: All tRPC calls, msmAPI queries, useNavigate, useTranslation, useInAppAlert, useEntityParam are in Container, not Component.
architecture.fix: Move data fetching and hooks from Component to Container, pass computed values as props

architecture.name: Component is pure UI
architecture.check: Component receives all data via typed props (MT* interface). No tRPC, no msmAPI, no useNavigate, no fetch calls.
architecture.fix: Component should only receive data via props from Container. Define props as MT* interface.

architecture.name: All 3 layers exist
architecture.check: For each feature, Page + Container + Component files all exist at correct locations per conventions.json → architecture → layers.
architecture.expected: Page at src/apps/{client}/page/{entity}/, Container at src/apps/{client}/container/{entity}/{action}/, Component at src/apps/{client}/component/{entity}/ or src/common/component/

architecture.name: File and type naming follows conventions
architecture.check: Components use MC prefix, types use MT prefix, styled components use SC prefix, enums use ME prefix, hooks use 'use' prefix.
architecture.expected: All exported names follow prefix conventions from conventions.json → namingPrefixes

styling.name: No hardcoded colors
styling.fix: Replace with props.theme.mcui.palette.* token (e.g., props.theme.mcui.palette.background.primary, props.theme.mcui.palette.content.primary, props.theme.mcui.palette.border.primary)

styling.name: No hardcoded spacing
styling.fix: Replace with props.theme.mcui.spacing(n) where n is multiplier of 8px base unit (e.g., spacing(1)=8px, spacing(2)=16px, spacing(3)=24px)

styling.name: No inline styles
styling.fix: Use styled-components with SC* prefix (e.g., const SCWrapper = styled.div`...`)

styling.name: Styled components use SC prefix
styling.fix: Rename to SC* prefix (e.g., const SCWrapper = styled.div`...`)

styling.name: Non-HTML props use $ prefix
styling.check: Props passed to styled-components that are not valid HTML attributes must use $ prefix to prevent DOM forwarding.
styling.fix: Rename prop to $propName in both styled component definition and JSX usage (e.g., $isActive, $direction, $width)

components.name: Form inputs inside Formik
components.check: All MCForm* components are rendered inside a <Formik> or <Form> ancestor. Components with formikRequired=true in components.json must have Formik context.
components.fix: Wrap in <Formik initialValues={...} validationSchema={...} onSubmit={...}> context. Keep the affected component list aligned with component-dependencies.json.

components.name: No MCSingleTextInput in forms
components.check: MCSingleTextInput is not used inside forms. MCFormTextInput must be used instead for Formik integration.
components.fix: Replace MCSingleTextInput with MCFormTextInput which provides Formik integration, label, error display, and accessibility

components.name: Correct import paths
components.check: Each component is imported using the exact importStatement from components.json. Common paths: form inputs from @msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/, form shared from @msm-portal/common/component/form/shared/, buttons from @moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui.
components.fix: Use the exact importStatement from components.json for each component

components.name: Required props provided
components.check: All props marked required=true in components.json are provided in JSX. For MCForm* components, the 'name' prop is always required.
components.fix: Add missing required props. Check components.json → props array for each component.

components.name: Component composition valid
components.check: Components with must_be_inside constraints in components.json → compositions are rendered within the specified parent. Example: MCFormTextInput must be inside Formik context.
components.fix: Wrap component in required parent per components.json → compositions.must_be_inside

components.name: Form structure follows pattern
components.check: Forms use the correct hierarchy: MCFormPanel → MCFormPanelTitle + MCFormPanelBody → MCFormFieldGroup → MCForm* inputs. MCFormActions at bottom with Cancel + Submit.
components.fix: Follow patterns.json → form-basic for correct form component hierarchy

contract.name: No raw public UI imports
contract.check: Product-facing msm-portal-web code should not import raw shadcn or low-level UI primitives as public replacements for stable MC* contracts.
contract.fix: Use stable MC* contracts in product code. Keep raw implementation imports inside adapter or implementation layers.

contract.name: Prefer semantic token meaning
contract.check: When tokens.json already declares a known codebase deviation, product code should use the canonical semantic token path instead of the legacy or undocumented token path.
contract.fix: Replace the legacy token path with the canonical semantic token path documented in tokens.json#codebase_deviations.

i18n.name: No hardcoded user-facing strings
i18n.fix: Replace with {t('key.path')} using useTranslation. See patterns.json → i18n-usage.

i18n.name: Correct i18n namespace
i18n.check: useTranslation namespace follows convention from patterns.json → i18n-usage: 'container.{entity}.{action}' for containers, 'form.{entity}' for forms.

i18n.name: i18n resource file exists
i18n.check: The i18n resource file exists with all keys used in the code. Resource files located at src/i18n/assets/{lang}/sot-resource.json or src/i18n/locales/en/{namespace}.json.
i18n.fix: Create the i18n JSON file with all required keys matching t() calls in the code

i18n.name: Breadcrumb labels use i18n
i18n.check: Breadcrumb crumb values in route registration use i18n keys following pattern: route.breadcrumb.{crumb}.
i18n.fix: Use i18n key for breadcrumb handle.crumb in routeTemplate.tsx

states.name: Loading state handled
states.check: Container checks isFetching/isLoading and renders MCCircularLoader (fillParent for full-page) or MCLoader (inline). Pattern: if (isLoading) return <MCCircularLoader fillParent />; or conditional render: isFetching || !data ? <MCCircularLoader fillParent /> : <Component />.
states.fix: Add loading state in Container: if (isLoading) return <MCCircularLoader fillParent />;

states.name: Error state handled
states.check: Container handles query errors via useEffect watching error + fireCollapsibleError from useInAppAlert. For query errors: navigate away. For mutation errors: stay on page.
states.fix: Add error handling: useEffect(() => { if (error) { fireCollapsibleError({ summary: t('message.read.error'), error }); handleClose(); } }, [error]);

states.name: Empty state handled
states.check: Component handles empty data (empty list, null entity) with meaningful message. Empty table shows explanatory message. Empty detail shows appropriate fallback.
states.fix: Add empty state rendering when data is empty/null with descriptive message and call-to-action

states.name: Submit button disabled during submission
states.check: Submit button in forms has disabled={isSubmitting} to prevent double submission. Pattern from patterns.json → form-basic.
states.fix: Add disabled={isSubmitting} to the submit MCButton2: <MCButton2 variant="basic" type="submit" disabled={isSubmitting}>

states.name: Success feedback provided
states.check: After successful mutation, fireSuccess toast is shown and user is navigated to appropriate page. Create → list page. Edit → detail page.
states.fix: Add: fireSuccess(t('message.create.success')); then navigate to list/detail page

routing.name: Route key registered in MERouteKey
routing.check: New page has corresponding MERouteKey enum value in src/route/types.ts. Convention: {ENTITY}_MAIN, {ENTITY}_CREATE, {ENTITY}_DETAIL, {ENTITY}_EDIT.
routing.fix: Add enum value to MERouteKey in src/route/types.ts

routing.name: Route template registered
routing.check: Route entry exists in src/app-builder/route/template/routeTemplate.tsx with path and breadcrumb handle.
routing.fix: Add route entry with path, key, and handle.crumb in routeTemplate.tsx

routing.name: Client route mapping exists
routing.check: Route is mapped to component in src/apps/{client}/config/route.tsx with allowedRoles.
routing.fix: Add { key: MERouteKey.{ENTITY}_MAIN, element: <{Entity}List />, allowedRoles: [...] } to client route config

scoring.pass: All error-severity checks pass, no more than 2 warnings

ux_writing.name: Discouraged UX writing phrases
ux_writing.check: Locale strings should avoid dismissive, blameful, or needlessly forceful phrases defined in ux-writing.json → machine_checks.discouraged_phrases.
ux_writing.fix: Replace the phrase with calmer and more direct guidance. Prefer next-step instructions over tone markers.

ux_writing.name: Generic CTA wording
ux_writing.check: Submit-style action keys should describe the concrete result instead of using generic verbs such as 'Submit' or '보내기' when ux-writing.json marks them as ambiguous.
ux_writing.fix: Replace the label with an action-specific phrase, such as 'Save changes', 'Send test link', or '비밀번호 재설정 이메일 보내기'.
